line2: Thy body shall be under my command, my fate shall be determined by thy sword.
line3: Follow the call of the Holy Grail. If thou dost accede to this will and this reason, then answer me.
line5: That I shall be all the good in the world,
line6: That I shall defeat all evil in the world.
line7: Thou seven heavens, clad in the three great words of power,
line8: Come forth from the circle of binding, O Guardian of the Scales!
